<!--
Thanks for your contribution! 🤗

Keep PRs small and focused on a single issue.
Multiple small PRs are better than one large PR.

Feel free to delete these comments after reading.
-->

## ✅ Prerequisites

- [ ] My code follows the project's
      [style guidelines](../docs/Styleguides.md)
- [ ] My code builds without errors or warnings
- [ ] All tests pass
- [ ] I've updated documentation as needed
- [ ] My commit messages follow the
      [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org) format

## 📝 Description

<!--
Give a clear and concise description of
what this PR does and how it works.

Optional: Use checkboxes to track specific changes:
- [ ] Not completed
- [x] Completed
-->

## 📸 Screenshots

<!--
If applicable, add screenshots to help demonstrate the changes.
Include text descriptions if possible, to help with searching.
-->

## 🧪 Testing

<!-- Describe how these changes were tested. Check all that apply: -->

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing performed

## ➕ Additional Context

<!--
Add any other context about the changes here:
breaking changes, new dependencies, behavior differences, etc.
-->

Resolves #123
Related to #456
